title: MARVEL Object for integrated splicing analysis platform
author: Wen, Wei Xiong (Sean)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a MARVEL object used in the computational analysis of RNAseq splicing correction related to paper titled "Robust CRISPR/dCas13 RNA blockers specifically perturb miRNA-target interactions and rescue type 1 myotonic dystrophy pathology"
steps_raw: This is a MARVEL object used in the computational analysis of RNAseq splicing correction related to paper titled "Robust CRISPR/dCas13 RNA blockers specifically perturb miRNA-target interactions and rescue type 1 myotonic dystrophy pathology"
